CodeNearby

# CodeNearby

## Find coding partners & build together—Tinder for developers!

84 followers

## Find coding partners & build together—Tinder for developers!

84 followers

Visit website

Team collaboration software

•

Knowledge base software

Codenearby helps developers connect, collaborate, and code together by finding like-minded programmers nearby or worldwide. Whether you're looking for a coding buddy, startup co-founder, or open-source contributor, swipe to match, chat, and start building!

 Overview
 Launches2
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Built with
 Team
 More

This is the 2nd launch from CodeNearby. View more

CodeNearby 2.0

## CodeNearby 2.0

Launching today

Tinder for developers! Find coding partners & build together [...] 📌

Hey Product Hunt! 👋 We're back, \\CodeNearby\\ is relaunching with a fresh UI and a bunch of new features. If you tried us before, this isn't the same app. If you haven't, now's the time. You won't be disappointed. \\What's new & what it does:\\ - 🎨 Rebuilt UI, cleaner, faster, way less clunky - 🔍 Search devs by skill, interest, location - 🤖 AI-Connect, describe who you need in plain English, get matched via GitHub - 💬 Real-time chat to actually talk to them - 📢 Developer feed for sharing updates/snippets - 🎭 Virtual gatherings, polls, events, discussions - 🐙 GitHub-synced profiles, zero manual setup It's fully \\open-source\\, self-host it, contribute, or just poke around: github.com/subh05sus/codenearby Go have a look and find your dev partner. Feedback, bugs, roasts, all welcome. 🙏 [...] No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for CodeNearby
